title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah greets sisters and mothers of Kerala on the occasion of Attukal Pongala
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah greets sisters and mothers of Kerala on the occasion of Attukal Pongala

May the blessings of Attukal Amma fill every life with prosperity and fulfill all cherished wishes

Posted On:
03 MAR 2026 3:04PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah today extended his heartiest greetings to the sisters and mothers of Kerala on the sacred occasion of Attukal Pongala.

In a post on X, Shri Amit Shah said, “Heartiest greetings to our sisters and mothers of Kerala on the sacred occasion of Attukal Pongala. As they gather to offer Pongala, I pray that their prayers may shower the blessings of Attukal Amma upon everyone, fill every life with prosperity, and fulfill all cherished wishes.”

Heartiest greetings to our sisters and mothers of Kerala on the sacred occasion of Attukal Pongala.
പൊങ്കാല അർപ്പിക്കാനായി അവർ ഒത്തുചേരുമ്പോൾ, ആ പ്രാർത്ഥനകൾ എല്ലാവരിലും ആറ്റുകാൽ അമ്മയുടെ അനുഗ്രഹം ചൊരിയട്ടെ എന്നും, ജീവിതത്തിൽ സമൃദ്ധി നിറച്ച് എല്ലാ അഭീഷ്ടങ്ങളും സഫലമാക്കട്ടെ എന്നും…
pic.twitter.com/VArqmGTIZv
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
March 3, 2026

***

RK/RR/PR/PS

(Release ID: 2234974)
